mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assistant_recommendation ( recommendation_id, user_id, request_id, thread_id, mode, candidate_count, rule_version, created_at ) VALUES ( #{recommendationId}, #{userId}, #{requestId}, #{threadId}, #{mode}, #{candidateCount}, #{ruleVersion}, #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO assistant_recommendation_item ( recommendation_id, spu_id, sku_id, candidate_position, selected, rank_position, rank_score ) VALUES
( #{recommendationId}, #{item.spuId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.candidatePosition}, #{item.selected}, #{item.rankPosition}, #{item.rankScore} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS spu_id, sku.id AS sku_id, p.spu_code, p.name, c.name AS category_name, p.main_image_url, f.name AS fit_type, co.name AS color, so.code AS size, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(m.name ORDER BY m.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_material pm JOIN material m ON m.id = pm.material_id WHERE pm.spu_id = p.id ) AS materials, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(se.code ORDER BY se.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_season ps JOIN season se ON se.id = ps.season_id WHERE ps.spu_id = p.id ) AS seasons, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(st.code ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_style_tag pst JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE pst.spu_id = p.id ) AS style_tags, sku.sale_price, 'in_stock' AS stock_status, ( SELECT MIN(inner_sku.sale_price) FROM product_sku inner_sku WHERE inner_sku.spu_id = p.id AND inner_sku.status = 'on_sale' ) AS min_price, ( SELECT MAX(inner_sku.sale_price) FROM product_sku inner_sku WHERE inner_sku.spu_id = p.id AND inner_sku.status = 'on_sale' ) AS max_price, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(inner_inv.available_stock), 0) FROM product_sku inner_sku LEFT JOIN inventory inner_inv ON inner_inv.sku_id = inner_sku.id WHERE inner_sku.spu_id = p.id AND inner_sku.status = 'on_sale' ) AS total_available_stock, sku.sku_code, inv.available_stock, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(pa.attr_name, ':', pa.attr_value) ORDER BY pa.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_attribute pa WHERE pa.spu_id = p.id ) AS attribute_tags FROM assistant_recommendation ar JOIN assistant_recommendation_item ari ON ari.recommendation_id = ar.recommendation_id JOIN product_spu p ON p.id = ari.spu_id JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN fit_type f ON f.id = p.fit_type_id JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = ari.sku_id AND sku.spu_id = p.id JOIN color co ON co.id = sku.color_id JOIN size_option so ON so.id = sku.size_id JOIN inventory inv ON inv.sku_id = sku.id WHERE ar.recommendation_id = #{recommendationId} AND ar.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'on_sale' AND sku.status = 'on_sale' AND inv.available_stock > 0 ORDER BY ari.selected DESC, CASE WHEN ari.selected = TRUE THEN ari.rank_position ELSE 2147483647 END ASC, ari.candidate_position ASC
